backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Luxyle app defining types and logic for feedback, appointments, user profiles, blocked dates, and admin authentication with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two admin dashboard fix features (Appointments tab and Feedback tab) to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing styling, components, hooks, and pages in the Luxyle React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with a shared Layout (Header/Footer/Toaster) and three routes: home (/), contact (/contact), and admin (/admin).
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Renders the 'About Luxyle' section with a brand story paragraph and three brand pillars (Curated Excellence, Timeless Design, Personal Touch) using luxury typography styles.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays an access-restricted screen with a shield icon, message, and a link back to the home page for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Admin login form component with username/password inputs, show/hide password toggle, actor readiness indicator, and error handling that calls the `useAdminLogin` mutation hook on submit.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentBooki: A form component that lets users book showroom appointments by selecting a date, time slot, and entering contact details, with blocked-date validation and a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/components/CollectionGaller: Displays a responsive image grid of luxury interior décor photos with hover overlays and a fullscreen lightbox on click.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A review submission form with a star rating picker that posts feedback to the backend and shows a thank-you confirmation on success.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, Instagram link, quick navigation links with smooth-scroll support, and a store address with a Google Maps directions link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, smooth-scroll anchor handling, Instagram icon, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Displays a grid of hardcoded seed reviews alongside dynamically fetched approved backend reviews, each rendered as a styled card with a star rating.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and mutations for admin login, appointments (book, list, update status), feedback (list, update status), and blocked dates management, along with session storage helpers for admin auth state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a luxury-themed design system with CSS custom properties for colors (gold, ivory, royal blue) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with login gate, tabbed interface for managing appointments and feedback (view, filter by status, approve/reject), and blocked date management using the custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying business location, hours, social links, an embedded Google Map, and a simple contact form with toast notifications on submission.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Defines the main public-facing home page for Luxyle, composing a hero section, featured preview, about, collection gallery, reviews, feedback form, and appointment booking sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with luxury color tokens (gold, cream, ivory, royal-blue), custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Luxyle Admin, listing known issues (admin cannot view appointments or feedback), existing fix features, and pending action requests to repair backend queries and frontend React Query hooks for admin data access.
